United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Live PL: West Ham v Arsenal
programme.desc: Arsenal's pursuit of a league and European Cup double takes them to the London Stadium on Super Sunday as Mikel Arteta's men face a West Ham side fighting for top-flight survival.

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day four of the PGA Tour's Truist Championship, taking place at Quail Hollow Club. Sepp Straka outfought Shane Lowry for the win at this event a year ago.

programme.title: Live Zuffa Boxing 6: Prelims
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nevada, Julian Rodriguez takes on James Perella across 10 rounds of welterweight boxing, while Misael Rodriguez faces Andreas Katzourakis in middleweight action.

programme.title: Live Boxing Zuffa: Mosley Jr v Bohachuk
programme.desc: Competing under the Zuffa Boxing banner for the first time, Shane Mosley Jr - son of Hall of Famer Shane Mosley - headlines against 30-year-old Ukrainian fighter Serhii Bohachuk.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Ref Watch
programme.desc: The Sky Sports team analyse some of the big refereeing decisions from the weekend's games. Did the officials get it right.

programme.title: Live: Sky Sports FC
programme.desc: Have your say on the big talking points in this interactive show covering the major football headlines.

programme.title: Lunchtime Live
programme.desc: Sit down with Sky Sports News as the team break down all the sports stories making the headlines this lunchtime.

programme.title: Sports Desk
programme.desc: A breakdown of the stories hitting the news desk this afternoon, with live analysis and comment plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live IPL: Punjab.K v Delhi.C
programme.desc: Punjab Kings face Delhi Capitals in the IPL.

programme.title: Live MNF: Spurs v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: Following another pressure-relieving victory for Spurs, it's Leeds next at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium as the hosts target a third consecutive win in their fight for survival.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Angels conclude a three-game series against the Toronto Blue Jays at Rogers Centre. Right-handed Jose Soriano (1.74 ERA) is the projected starter for the Angels against left-handed Eric Lauer (6.03 ERA) for the Blue Jays.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.desc: Game 1 from May 6, 2026.

programme.desc: Game 2 from May 8, 2026.

programme.desc: Breaking news, analysis and debate from around the NHL.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Playoffs Rewind
programme.desc: Game 4 from May 10, 2026.

programme.title: Live: Real Kyper & Bourne
programme.desc: Nick Kypreos and Justin Bourne talk all things in the NHL.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: Hockey Central
programme.desc: Breaking news, analysis and debate from around the NHL.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Eastern Conference Second Round, Game 5. (if necessary).

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche face the Wild in Game 3 of the West second round at Grand Casino Arena in St. Paul. Colorado has won two straight. Martin Necas scored in Game 2, but Kirill Kaprizov tied it six seconds later for the fifth-fastest response in history.

programme.title: Live: FanDuel Racing
programme.desc: Live horse racing from around the country.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Twenty high-stakes poker players have busted from the WPT Alpha8 poker tournament, leaving three skilled mavericks to fight it out.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Switzerland is qualification masters, Virgil van Dijk might be the best defender in the world, and Haiti will bring their unique culture to the global stage.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Bafana Bafana return for the first time since hosting in 2010, Austria is reborn under Ralf Rangnick, and Thibaut Courtois is the leading goalkeeper in the world.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From the Cardiff International Arena in Wales, star middleweight Chris Eubank, Jr. looks to continue his winning streak when he takes on world championship contender Liam Williams.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: From Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Twenty high-stakes poker players have busted from the WPT Alpha8 poker tournament, leaving three skilled mavericks to fight it out.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in elimination match 1 to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Julian Brown is an environmental innovator and entrepreneur who developed Plastoline, a technology that transforms plastic waste into usable fuel. He walks us through his journey as a pioneer that's changing the world.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5

programme.desc: Twenty high-stakes poker players have busted from the WPT Alpha8 poker tournament, leaving three skilled mavericks to fight it out.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: The Netherlands remain the greatest football nation never to win the World Cup, Florian Wirtz is Germany's latest superstar, and we hear from some referees officiating in the biggest tournament of their lives.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Scotland will bring the Tartan Army to North America, Curaçao will be the tiniest nation at the Finals, and Memphis Depay will bid to add to his record haul of goals for the Netherlands.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in elimination match 1 to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: Live: NWSL Soccer
programme.desc: Kansas City Current host the visiting Chicago Stars FC in an NWSL soccer matchup at CPKC Stadium. Kansas City holds a 3-1-1 head-to-head over the last five meetings despite suffering a 1-2 defeat to Chicago during their March 2026 clash.

programme.title: Live: ESPN FC
programme.desc: Highlights, news, reactions and opinions from the day in soccer.

programme.title: Live: Spanish Primera Division Soccer
programme.desc: From Camp Nou in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain.

programme.title: Live: ESPN FC
programme.desc: Highlights, news, reactions and opinions from the day in soccer.

programme.title: ESPN Original Documentaries
programme.desc: Sports documentaries produced by the ESPN network.

programme.title: Live: Inside the NBA
programme.desc: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analyst

programme.desc: Eastern Conference Second Round, Game 3.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Western Conference Second Round, Game 4.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight: First Shift
programme.desc: A conversational style show featuring hard-hitting opinions and analysis on the news of the day, the daily program will be co-hosted by longtime NHL Network broadcaster EJ Hradek and a rotating group of NHL Network analysts.

programme.desc: Gear up for the night's hockey action with expert pregame analysis, exclusive insight from morning skates, and reporting from correspondents around the league.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays host the Rays at Rogers Centre to open a three-game American League East clash. The Blue Jays host the Rays for Legendary T-Shirt Night. Toronto looks to defend home turf against a Tampa Bay squad riding strong division momentum.

programme.title: The Breakdown
programme.desc: Featuring Gallagher PREM side Exeter Chiefs.

programme.title: The Breakdown

programme.desc: Milwaukee Brewers v New York Yankees (Start-time 7.10pm). Coverage of the inter-league match from American Family Field.

programme.desc: A look back at all of the biggest stories and best action from the 15th round of fixtures, including Bristol Bears v Saracens, Exeter Chiefs v Bath Rugby, and more.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Driving the rolling back roads of southern Kentucky, to gnaw pork shoulder steaks cooked over hickory fires and eat burgers fried in shallow oil; introducing viewers to a cultural microclimate that straddles the Kentucky-Tennessee line.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Allan Benton, proprietor of Benton's Smoky Mountain Country Hams in Madisonville, Tenn., cures and hickory smokes bacon and ham that have earned their place on the kitchen tables of working folks across the South, and on restaurant menus.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: John T. Edge travels around the region, introducing viewers to Southern tastemakers, food, culture and history.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Riding shotgun with Tommy Tomlinson, author of "The Elephant in the Room," as he returns to Brunswick and St. Simons Island, Ga., where he grew up; Tommy joins the crew to walk the beach, play pinball, and take in a baseball game.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: All the action from college baseball.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: Men's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From Arlotta Stadium in South Bend, Ind.

programme.title: Men's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From Class of 1952 Stadium in Princeton, N.J.

programme.title: Men's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Second Round.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Having worn out his welcome in the NBA, Paul Westhead heads to Loyola Marymount University to perfect his run-and-gun offensive system with players Hank Gathers and Bo Kimble.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Jim tries to harvest the biggest moose of his career.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott Leysath heads west to The Big Island of Hawaii in search of feral cows and well-fed wild boar; he enlists the help of a popular chef to cook them.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Join Beau & Walker on an adventure they will never forget catching Specs & Bass out of Highland Park Fish Camp in DeLand, Florida.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Musky Fishing on Lake of the Woods in Canada with Veterans at Myles Place Resort.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Combines the lives and dreams of Sparky, a retired professional firefighter and president of M2D Camo.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: In remote and rugged Kodiak Island, Alaska, bowhunter Mark Heck undertakes his fourth journey in pursuit of an Alaskan brown bear and comes toe to toe with a potential world-record archery brown bear at a mere 15 yards.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Alaska the last frontier, need we say more? On this episode Co-Host Colin Mulligan and the DUTV crew make the long journey to the rugged state of Alaska for an incredible bucket list waterfowl adventure....

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A showdown between Texas whitetails and a deadly duo of veteran bow hunters.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we finish up Tim's hunt with the Pork Police, and then he is after turkeys.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger and his daughter-in-law put an incredible stalk on a huge oryx bull in South Texas.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: David Blanton recounts some hunts from Georgia.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather Douville reconnects with her Tlingit heritage through teachings from her father, Mike Douville; a recognition of the critical need to safeguard traditional food sources and maintain ecosystem balance.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: We talk about improving the huntability of a property with Kenny Thompson, who manages numerous farms, plants hundreds of acres and creates water holes, funnels, turkey dusting areas and much more.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve, Mark Kenyon and Ryan Callaghan hunt for coues deer in the mountains of Sonora.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The hunt for coues deer continues, and the ranch chef prepares chili Colorado tamales with venison.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: We talk about improving the huntability of a property with Kenny Thompson, who manages numerous farms, plants hundreds of acres and creates water holes, funnels, turkey dusting areas and much more.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: A character-driven outdoor and travel series following Chapo Gringo as he moves through hunting camps, ranches, border towns, and remote places-meeting real people, telling real stories, and keeping things human.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A showdown between Texas whitetails and a deadly duo of veteran bow hunters.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: Following Retired Professional Boxer King Bedford on hunts all over the country, inspiring and educating the next generation of hunters.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Bill and Bass Pro Shops founder Johnny Morris are making memories along Florida's Space Coast!

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy and Mr Crappie fishing in Texas.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion anglers DeFoe and Lane compete to catch the largest bass.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week Blaine Anthony is in the Midwest hunting whitetail on a hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Uncle Steve, Chris and Tyler of Trekin Outdoors take you into the real and raw realities of everyday hunting. Chasing big game across public and private lands. Showcasing the challenges that ordinary outdoorsman face.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Searching North America for giant bucks and revealing the secrets of the Tecomate Management System.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Ozzie Lessinger take advantage of the springtime bite at South Seas Island Resort.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Joined by repeat client Bryan Russel, the plan is to head offshore for mahi mahi, permit and cobia.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Bob goes back to Reelfoot Lake in Tennessee for some late spring crappie fishing.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Scott explores both coasts; first up, invasive, toothy air-breathing snakeheads in Florida; then, Northern California for rattlesnakes; both are cooked and put to the taste test.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather Douville reconnects with her Tlingit heritage through teachings from her father, Mike Douville; a recognition of the critical need to safeguard traditional food sources and maintain ecosystem balance.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Mark and Laden head north to Manitoba, searching for monster springtime bruins.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: A look back at the best moments of 2011.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Marine Corps sniper AJ Psiciuti's story of a lost M-40A1.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Joined by repeat client Bryan Russel, the plan is to head offshore for mahi mahi, permit and cobia.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: David Blanton looks at hunts from kids hunting Realtree farms.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, Dr. Marcus Lashley of the University of Florida joins us to explain his team's ongoing wild turkey poult research. It's fascinating stuff. Listen to the full conversation on Gamekeeper Podcast #332.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: A character-driven outdoor and travel series following Chapo Gringo as he moves through hunting camps, ranches, border towns, and remote places-meeting real people, telling real stories, and keeping things human.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger knocks down a huge trophy whitetail buck in Northern Missouri.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In the flooded cornfields of northeastern South Dakota, Steven finds ideal conditions for duck hunting with Cal and waterfowl expert Sean Weaver.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: MLB player Pete Alonso fulfills a dream by hunting mule deer with Steven at a private ranch in southern Colorado.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa heads to Texas for her first ever hunt for blackbuck.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Night hunting the world.

programme.title: Mets Classics
programme.desc: From May 2, 2024. Francisco Lindor rallies Mets in extras.

programme.title: Amazin' Finishes
programme.desc: A year-by-year look at the team's most exciting comebacks, big hits, clutch performances and walk-off homers - all on full display for Mets fans to relive.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Chase Field in Phoenix.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories from 1976.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories from 1993.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at 1995, when head coach Pat Riley sent his resignation letter via fax and left the New York Knicks for the Miami Heat.

programme.desc: From Maimonides Park in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Black College Quiz
programme.desc: The Black College Quiz series is designed to encourage an appreciation of African-American Heritage and feature college students from Historically Black Institutions. Morehouse College, Spelman College, Chicago State University.

programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads out to fish for summertime largemouth and smallmouth bass. The weather plays a factor as the temperature soars to 101 degrees. Charlie preps summertime Maine lobsters and littleneck clams.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Ultimate Frisbee Association
programme.desc: Coverage of the semi-professional ultimate frisbee league in North America.

programme.desc: From Sportpark De Adelaarshortst in Deventer, Overijssel, Netherlands.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Z's college roommate Andrew Lemle joins for an otherworldly Smallmouth expedition.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Fletcher Shryock battles Spencer Shuffield in the first Semifinal.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Three Teams compete in Texas for Knockout Match 2 of the Patriot Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: The bass are biting topwater baits like crazy. Chris Lane gets fish after fish, and it's only a matter of time until a giant largemouth crushes the topwater bait.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe continues his obsession as he hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in the grassy lakes of Louisiana.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Z's college roommate Andrew Lemle joins for an otherworldly Smallmouth expedition.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Fletcher Shryock battles Spencer Shuffield in the first Semifinal.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: Landlocked by South Africa, lies a country with the highest lowest point in the world, the mountain Kingdom of Lesotho. Hiding in these magnificent Maluti Mountains, you will discover the gem that is Semonkong Lodge, situated on the banks...

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: This stretch of coastline has claimed more ships and spun more stories of sunken treasure than any in Africa, justifying its title. The team venture along this barren landscape unearthing species unique to this rich coastline despite the inclement...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The Royal Flush a hand that can't be beaten! Kings and Queens abound in Mozambique's waters off Beira, a light tackle angler's paradise.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The Inside Angling team travel to the 2nd largest dam in South Africa to discover what the great Vanderkloof dam has to offer. Join Tommo as he targets the various species said to be found in this dam.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: South Africa's famous game reserve The Kruger Park is the stage for a scientific expedition to tag and track the indigenous tiger fish. Wildfly join the university research team with the exciting task of catching these acrobatic fish in amongst spellbinding wildlife.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy's on the Atlantic coast running down mullet and Maine lobsters.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef Jon Coates create Pollack Kiev with minted peas, triple cooked fries and a luxurious Herb Beurre blanc.

programme.title: The Obsession of Carter Andrews
programme.desc: Fishing with his wife, Heidi, Carter looks for a peacock bass weighing at least 20 pounds while fishing the Rio Marié deep in the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: Landlocked by South Africa, lies a country with the highest lowest point in the world, the mountain Kingdom of Lesotho. Hiding in these magnificent Maluti Mountains, you will discover the gem that is Semonkong Lodge, situated on the banks...

programme.desc: Tommy eats his way through the best local seafood dishes in Portland, OR and Chula Vista, CA.

programme.desc: Mike and Chef James Erasmus create their own version of a classic Indian dish, Kedgeree Royale with hot smoked Bass.

programme.desc: Fishing with his wife, Heidi, Carter looks for a peacock bass weighing at least 20 pounds while fishing the Rio Marié deep in the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: Landlocked by South Africa, lies a country with the highest lowest point in the world, the mountain Kingdom of Lesotho. Hiding in these magnificent Maluti Mountains, you will discover the gem that is Semonkong Lodge, situated on the banks...

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: This stretch of coastline has claimed more ships and spun more stories of sunken treasure than any in Africa, justifying its title. The team venture along this barren landscape unearthing species unique to this rich coastline despite the inclement...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The Royal Flush a hand that can't be beaten! Kings and Queens abound in Mozambique's waters off Beira, a light tackle angler's paradise.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The Inside Angling team travel to the 2nd largest dam in South Africa to discover what the great Vanderkloof dam has to offer. Join Tommo as he targets the various species said to be found in this dam.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: South Africa's famous game reserve The Kruger Park is the stage for a scientific expedition to tag and track the indigenous tiger fish. Wildfly join the university research team with the exciting task of catching these acrobatic fish in amongst spellbinding wildlife.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy eats his way through the best local seafood dishes in Portland, OR and Chula Vista, CA.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James Erasmus create their own version of a classic Indian dish, Kedgeree Royale with hot smoked Bass.

programme.title: The Obsession of Carter Andrews
programme.desc: Fishing with his wife, Heidi, Carter looks for a peacock bass weighing at least 20 pounds while fishing the Rio Marié deep in the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: Landlocked by South Africa, lies a country with the highest lowest point in the world, the mountain Kingdom of Lesotho. Hiding in these magnificent Maluti Mountains, you will discover the gem that is Semonkong Lodge, situated on the banks...

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: This stretch of coastline has claimed more ships and spun more stories of sunken treasure than any in Africa, justifying its title. The team venture along this barren landscape unearthing species unique to this rich coastline despite the inclement...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The Royal Flush a hand that can't be beaten! Kings and Queens abound in Mozambique's waters off Beira, a light tackle angler's paradise.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The Inside Angling team travel to the 2nd largest dam in South Africa to discover what the great Vanderkloof dam has to offer. Join Tommo as he targets the various species said to be found in this dam.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: South Africa's famous game reserve The Kruger Park is the stage for a scientific expedition to tag and track the indigenous tiger fish. Wildfly join the university research team with the exciting task of catching these acrobatic fish in amongst spellbinding wildlife.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy eats his way through the best local seafood dishes in Portland, OR and Chula Vista, CA.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James Erasmus create their own version of a classic Indian dish, Kedgeree Royale with hot smoked Bass.

programme.title: The Obsession of Carter Andrews
programme.desc: Fishing with his wife, Heidi, Carter looks for a peacock bass weighing at least 20 pounds while fishing the Rio Marié deep in the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Pro Bass angler Greg Hackney is back with Z to check in on the progress of one of the best Bass fishing lakes on the planet.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Todd Goad squares off against Keith Combs in the second Semifinal match.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four Teams compete in Oxford, AL for the Patriot Cup Championship Trophy.

programme.title: Live: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Coverage from the fourth and final day of the seventh round of the season, which takes place at Trump National Golf Club Washington in Potomac Falls, Virginia.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the Grand Prix of France MotoGP race.

programme.title: World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Action from the third day of the Rally de Portugal.

programme.desc: Exeter Chiefs v Bath Rugby.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Newcastle Red Bulls v Harlequins.

programme.title: Serie A
programme.desc: AC Milan v Atalanta.

programme.title: Giro d'Italia Men Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third stage of the race.

programme.title: Men's Cycling Pro Series
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Tro Bro Leon.

programme.title: Men's Cycling Pro Series
programme.desc: Action from the first stage of the 2026 Baku-Khankendi Azerbaijan Cycling Race.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Action from the fourth and final day of the seventh round of the season, which takes place at Trump National Golf Club Washington in Potomac Falls, Virginia.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1996/97 UEFA Champions League final between Borussia Dortmund and Juventus in Munich. Armed with an expensively assembled squad, Juve were overwhelming favourites.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: Real Madrid went in search of their seventh European Cup title when they faced Juventus in the 1998 final in Amsterdam. The Serie A winners featured a 25-year-old Zinedine Zidane.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, featured for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2001 final between Bayern Munich and Valencia in Milan. Bayern, chasing their first title in a quarter-century, featured a 20-year-old Owen Hargreaves.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Jose Mourinho would leave Porto to take over at Chelsea just days later.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2011/12 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Chelsea at the Allianz Arena. This was Chelsea's second final, having lost their first in 2008.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Action from the fourth and final day of the seventh round of the season, which takes place at Trump National Golf Club Washington in Potomac Falls, Virginia.
